title: WidgetActions
description: Canonical action-map shared by every action-bearing widget (Button, Form, List rows). Single source of truth: widget schemas copy this verbatim into widgetData.actions (validate-schemas enforces no drift) and the WidgetActions type is generated from it.

rest.description: rest api call actions triggered by the widget

resourceRefId.description: the identifier of the k8s custom resource that should be represented

requireConfirmation.description: whether user confirmation is required before triggering the action

errorMessage.description: a message that will be displayed inside a toast in case of error

successMessage.description: a message that will be displayed inside a toast in case of success

onSuccessNavigateTo.description: url to navigate to after successful execution

onEventNavigateTo.description: conditional navigation triggered by a specific event

eventReason.description: identifier of the awaited event reason

url.description: url to navigate to when the event is received

timeout.description: the timeout in seconds to wait for the event

loadingMessage.description: message to display while waiting for the event

headers.description: array of headers as strings, format 'key: value'

items.description: key and value as a single, example: 'x-custom-header: value'

payload.description: static payload sent with the request

payloadToOverride.description: list of payload fields to override dynamically

name.description: name of the field to override

value.description: value to use for overriding the field

path.description: the identifier of the route to navigate to

resourceRefId.description: the identifier of the k8s custom resource that should be represented

requireConfirmation.description: whether user confirmation is required before navigating

openDrawer.description: actions to open side drawer components

id.description: unique identifier for the drawer action

resourceRefId.description: the identifier of the k8s custom resource that should be represented

requireConfirmation.description: whether user confirmation is required before opening

title.description: title shown in the drawer header

openModal.description: actions to open modal dialog components

id.description: unique identifier for the modal action

resourceRefId.description: the identifier of the k8s custom resource that should be represented

requireConfirmation.description: whether user confirmation is required before opening

title.description: title shown in the modal header

customWidth.description: the custom width of the value, which should be used by setting the 'custom' value inside the 'size' property

size.description: sets the Modal size, 'default' is 520px, 'large' is 80% of the screen width, 'fullscreen' is 100% of the screen width, 'custom' should be used with the 'customWidth' property
